title: Trump's UFC fights bring historic spectacle to White House - NPR
summary_full: Trump's UFC fights bring historic spectacle to White House  NPRHere's how weather could impact the UFC Freedom 250 Fight on the White House lawn  WUSA9White House hosting "UFC Freedom 250" fight on Trump's 80th birthday tonight  CBS NewsTrump turns 80 with a showstopping spectacle of cage fights at the White House. But big issues loom  AP NewsFew Americans back Trump's White House cage match plan, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters
